evals.prompt: I have a Coolify server at IP YOUR_SERVER_IP. I want to deploy Paperclip on it. Can you walk me through it?
evals.expected_output: The agent should guide through all 8 phases: discover infra, create project/app, config env vars, storage, fix permissions, deploy, and onboard. It should mention using branch 'master' not 'main', generating BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, using /paperclip mount, and disabling health check.

assertions.text: Agent mentions onboarding command: docker exec ... paperclipai onboard

evals.prompt: Deploy Paperclip AI orchestration platform on Coolify. My Coolify is already running. I need the full setup.
evals.expected_output: The agent should provide a complete end-to-end deployment plan using the Coolify MCP tools where possible, and exact SSH commands where needed. It should cover all known gotchas from the skill.

assertions.text: Agent mentions using Coolify tools (coolify_projects, coolify_application, coolify_deploy)
Agent mentions running docker exec for onboarding
Agent provides exact commands (chown, chmod, docker exec, onboard)
Agent mentions getting the CEO invite URL

evals.prompt: I tried deploying Paperclip on Coolify but got an error: 'fatal: Remote branch main not found in upstream origin'. How do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: The agent should immediately identify this error as coming from branch 'main' instead of 'master' and provide the exact fix: change branch to 'master' and redeploy.

assertions.text: Agent identifies wrong branch 'main' as cause
Agent provides fix: change to 'master' branch
